boundary_rows.claim_boundary: Bounded open-system objective evidence uses scipy Lindblad density-matrix evolution and seeded MCWF trajectory ensembles on small local systems. Gradients are deterministic central finite differences over scalar coupling and damping scales; they are not hardware gradients, adjoint Lindblad gradients, unbiased stochastic-gradient estimators, or isolated performance benchmarks.
boundary_rows.setup_instructions: Only central finite differences over bounded scalar scales are executed. Continuous adjoint Lindblad sensitivities require a separate validated solver and invariant-preserving gradient checks.

boundary_rows.claim_boundary: Bounded open-system objective evidence uses scipy Lindblad density-matrix evolution and seeded MCWF trajectory ensembles on small local systems. Gradients are deterministic central finite differences over scalar coupling and damping scales; they are not hardware gradients, adjoint Lindblad gradients, unbiased stochastic-gradient estimators, or isolated performance benchmarks.
boundary_rows.setup_instructions: No hardware-submitted open-system gradient or provider attestation is included. Provider execution remains behind the live-ticket gate.
